title: Has been blocked by CORS policy: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin'
excerpt: Access to fetch at ‘https://api.monday.com/v2’ from origin ‘https://MyApp’ has been blocked by CORS policy: No ‘Access-Control-Allow-Origin’ header is present on the requested resource. If an opaque response serves your …

posts.author: alew140 (alejandro )
posts.cookedHtml: Access to fetch at ‘https://api.monday.com/v2’ from origin ‘https://MyApp’ has been blocked by CORS policy: No ‘Access-Control-Allow-Origin’ header is present on the requested resource. If an opaque response serves your needs, set the request’s mode to ‘no-cors’ to fetch the resource with CORS disabled.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @alew140!

Welcome to the community !!! I hope you enjoy it here!

I am curious about your issue. Which origin URL are you using?

Also, I found this article that might be of use to you.

Looking forward to hearing from you again!

Cheers,
-Matias
